arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: قُلْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ اسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ فَقَالُوا إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْآنًا عَجَبًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘It has been revealed to me that a team of the jinn listened [to the Quran] and they said, “Indeed we heard a wonderful Quran,
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: يَهْدِي إِلَى الرُّشْدِ فَآمَنَّا بِهِ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَا أَحَدًا
english translation text:
which guides to rectitude. Hence, we have believed in it and we will never ascribe any partner to our Lord.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ تَعَالَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا اتَّخَذَ صَاحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
english translation text:
Exalted be the majesty of our Lord; He has taken neither any spouse nor son.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى اللَّهِ شَطَطًا
english translation text:
The foolish ones among us used to speak atrocious lies concerning Allah.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّا أَن لَّن تَقُولَ الْإِنسُ وَالْجِنُّ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا
english translation text:
We thought that humans and jinn would never utter any falsehood concerning Allah.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ الْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
english translation text:
Indeed some persons from the humans would seek the protection of some persons from the jinn, thus only adding to their rebellion.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ أَحَدًا
english translation text:
They thought, just as you think, that Allah will not raise anyone from the dead.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا السَّمَاءَ فَوَجَدْنَاهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
english translation text:
Indeed we made for the heaven and found it full of mighty sentries and flames.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَاعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ الْآنَ يَجِدْ لَهُ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
english translation text:
We used to sit in its positions to eavesdrop, but anyone listening now finds a flame waiting for him.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِي أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِي الْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
english translation text:
We do not know whether ill is intended for those who are on the earth, or whether their Lord intends good for them.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا الصَّالِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَائِقَ قِدَدًا
english translation text:
Among us some are righteous and some are otherwise: we are various sects.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّا أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ اللَّهَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُ هَرَبًا
english translation text:
We know that we cannot frustrate Allah on the earth, nor can we frustrate Him by fleeing.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا الْهُدَىٰ آمَنَّا بِهِ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِن بِرَبِّهِ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
english translation text:
When we heard the [message of] guidance, we believed in it. Whoever that has faith in his Lord will fear neither privation nor oppression.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا الْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا الْقَاسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا رَشَدًا
english translation text:
Among us some are Muslims and some of us are perverse.” ’ Those who submit [to Allah]—it is they who pursue rectitude.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَمَّا الْقَاسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
english translation text:
As for the perverse, they will be firewood for hell.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَن لَّوِ اسْتَقَامُوا عَلَى الطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَاهُم مَّاءً غَدَقًا
english translation text:
If they are steadfast on the path [of Allah], We shall provide them with abundant water,
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
english translation text:
so that We may test them therein, and whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord, He will let him into an escalating punishment.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّ الْمَسَاجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا مَعَ اللَّهِ أَحَدًا
english translation text:
The places of worship belong to Allah, so do not invoke anyone along with Allah.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
english translation text:
When the servant of Allah rose to pray to Him, they almost crowded around him.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَدْعُو رَبِّي وَلَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ أَحَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘I pray only to my Lord, and I do not ascribe any partner to Him.’
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: قُلْ إِنِّي لَا أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘I have no power to bring you any harm or good [of my own accord].’
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: قُلْ إِنِّي لَن يُجِيرَنِي مِنَ اللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِ مُلْتَحَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘Neither can anyone shelter me from Allah, nor can I find any refuge besides Him.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: إِلَّا بَلَاغًا مِّنَ اللَّهِ وَرِسَالَاتِهِ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ لَهُ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا
english translation text:
[I have no duty] except to transmit from Allah, and [to communicate] His messages; and whoever disobeys Allah and His apostle, there will indeed be for him the fire of hell, to remain in it forever.’
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا رَأَوْا مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
english translation text:
When they see what they are promised, they will know who is weaker in supporters and fewer in numbers.
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِي أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُ رَبِّي أَمَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘I do not know if what you are promised is near, or if my Lord has set a [long] term for it.’
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِ أَحَدًا
english translation text:
Knower of the Unseen, He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] Unseen to anyone,
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: إِلَّا مَنِ ارْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُ يَسْلُكُ مِن بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ رَصَدًا
english translation text:
except to an apostle He approves of. Then He dispatches a sentinel before and behind him
Al Jinn – The Jinn

arabic text: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا رِسَالَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدَدًا
english translation text:
so that He may ascertain that they have communicated the messages of their Lord, and He encompasses all that is with them, and He keeps an count of all things.
Al Jinn – The Jinn
